phases_completed.summary: Broker core + IPC; live broker daemon works
Channel + plugin.Host interfaces + per-route worker substrate. c3types/channel/plugin packages, RouteWorker, WorkerPool, Broker.Shutdown.
phases_completed.self_review: Substrate for Plan 4B (Telegram) and Plan 5 (plugin host concrete impl) in place. Channel interface and plugin.Host interface declared. RouteWorker idle-timeout/stop/release-exit all tested. WorkerPool lazy-spawn + reap. Worker dispatch stubbed; real wiring deferred. 72 tests pass.

scaffold.summary: gotgbot/v2 rc.34 added; internal/channel/telegram package with Channel struct that connects to Bot API on Start; internal/broker/host.go implements channel.Host (Config/Emit/Logf/Done); Broker gains channel registry (RegisterChannel/Channel/Channels/Shutdown order: channels → workers → ctx); cmd/c3-broker registers telegram only when bot_token present, otherwise runs without inbound transport (first-install path). Live smoke test confirmed bot connects as @OCDWaterBot.

remaining: SendReply implementation (gotgbot Bot.SendMessage with message_thread_id, reply_parameters, parse_mode)
DownloadAttachment (Bot.GetFile + HTTP download to local path)
CreateTopic (Bot.CreateForumTopic with rate-limit retry honoring parameters.retry_after)
ValidateTopic (Bot.SendChatAction with thread_id; spec §6 typing-action approach)
Inbound conversion: Update→c3types.Inbound for text, voice (with attachment meta), photo, document, sticker, video, video_note
STT prefix: channel writes [Transcribed voice]: prefix when STT plugin returns transcript (Plan 5 dependency)
Debounce window: per-route 1.5s default, max 50 messages, latest message_id wins
Cooldown-fallback reply: broker-side detect no-claim, send 'No CLI is currently attached' once per (channel,chat,topic) per 300s
Wire OutboundJob.ResultCh back through ipc.OpToolResult so tool calls return results to adapters

phase_4a_complete.summary: Channel/Host interfaces + per-route worker substrate. c3types/channel/plugin packages, RouteWorker, WorkerPool, Broker.Shutdown.

notes: Phase 1+2+3+4A complete. Plan 4B is the Telegram channel implementation — first plan that adds an external dependency and significant integration with a third-party API. Will need careful TDD given the live Bot API surface.
